article_title: ASP.NET Core Identity API 端点：什么时候该用，什么时候该跑
core_theme: MapIdentityApi 一行代码给 10 个认证端点，但返回的 token 不是 JWT——这条技术选型路径的得与失
reader_takeaway: 清楚 MapIdentityApi 的适用边界：什么时候省掉几天开发，什么时候必须自己接管 token
summary_angle: 一行代码挂载 10 个端点 vs token 不是 JWT，两条路径在岔路口交汇，选对方向才能真正省下来

information_blocks.source_anchor: MapIdentityApi adds ten endpoints with a single call: register, login, refresh, email confirmation, 2FA
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一条简洁代码线分出 10 个端点节点的示意

information_blocks.source_anchor: The tokens aren't standard JWTs — opaque, app-only encrypted strings, no second service can validate them
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一把锁住的 token 图标，周围服务无法接入

information_blocks.source_anchor: Keep Identity for user store, drop MapIdentityApi, write custom login endpoint that issues real signed JWT
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一条新的代码流水线，SignInManager + TokenService 产出签名 JWT

main_metaphor: 技术选型的三岔路口——左边是快速上线的 MapIdentityApi，右边是完整的自建 JWT，上方还有 OIDC Provider 的第三条路
primary_subject: 一个抽象的三岔路标或方向指示装置，每个方向标注不同的技术路径
subject_action: 路标矗立在岔路口，三条路径指向不同的认证方案，主体作为一个决策锚点
composition: 单点聚焦，以岔路口标识为主体，三条分支自然延伸，保持宽屏可读
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: high-contrast cinematic illustration, strong key light, deep shadows, wide-screen composition, dramatic but realistic color grading
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从40项风格池随机选中；本文涉及认证决策路径的选择与对比，适合用高对比、光影强烈的视觉语言表达岔路口主题
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 第一轮先验证三岔路口隐喻是否成立、叙事信息块是否可读、高对比电影风格是否到位
revision_targets: 信息块标签太大像海报标题
光影过于扁平缺少电影感
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: MapIdentityApi adds 10 auth endpoints with one line but the token is not JWT — the trade-off decision between fast setup and scalable architecture. The reader should quickly feel the weight of choosing between three auth paths in .NET.

Summary angle: One line gives you 10 endpoints vs the token is not a real JWT — two paths converging at a fork, choose right to actually save time.
Narrative flow: conflict-to-resolution. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- mechanism: MapIdentityApi adds ten endpoints with a single call (1行=10端点, number: 10)
- contrast: The tokens are opaque, not JWTs — no second service can validate them (非JWT)
- solution: Keep Identity for user store, write custom login endpoint that issues real signed JWT (自建JWT)

Main metaphor: A three-way fork in the road representing the auth architecture decision — left path is fast MapIdentityApi, right path is custom JWT, a third elevated path hints at OIDC Provider.
Subject: An abstract three-way directional signpost or path marker at a crossroads, each direction labeled with a different technical path.
Composition/framing: single focal point with the signpost as the dominant subject, three branches extending naturally, horizontally legible in a wide cover. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: high-contrast cinematic illustration, strong key light, deep shadows, wide-screen composition, dramatic but realistic color grading. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: deep blue, warm orange, charcoal gray.
Visible text policy: allow only 1-3 short Chinese labels or number chips by default, and no more than 4 when strictly necessary, all sourced from the information blocks. Each label <= 6 Chinese characters or one required product/model name. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: floating chips, code rain, neon skyscrapers, generic robot poses, fake dashboards, fake terminal output.
